creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 187160
svn diff to bring the port to 1.2.0

Update gitea to newest release 1.2.0

Changelog: https://blog.gitea.io/2017/10/release-of-1.2.0/

We have changed the Logo design. Many new features added like Status API and showing it in commit tab, integration with 20+ OAuth2 providers and support for OpenID login, Team Units, GPG signed commit validation, Batch operations on issues. Also there are more than 200 bugs fixed in this release cycle.
